name: Possible Backdoor Activity via File Dropping and Firewall Rule Creation
description: Detects the creation of a file named server.exe in the %TEMP% directory followed by a firewall rule creation allowing this file for external communication, indicative of potential njRAT (Bladabindi) backdoor activity. Its presence suggests malicious behavior, including unauthorized remote access and possible data exfiltration.

rules.name: Firewall Rule Creation for Suspicious Server.exe in User Temp Directory
Possible Backdoor Dropping by Suspicious File Creation in User Temp Directory

author: Ahmed Kamal
